fb4609d60dae.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
fb4609d60dae.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
fb4609d60dae.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

57f3c03fd8d9.title: Build review volume — you lack statistical credibility
57f3c03fd8d9.description: Only 18 Google reviews. A single bad review moves your average visibly. Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews.

01e7cacf2717.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
01e7cacf2717.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

b301fd18dedc.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
b301fd18dedc.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
b301fd18dedc.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

70013152e938.title: Ranked #4 of 5 locally — peers are ahead
70013152e938.description: At percentile 25.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.
